measurement_note: Size is N, the number of time indices, while every tier allows one resize and uses the increasing sequence from 1 through N. The optimal two segments have equal lengths, giving the authored closed-form waste. The reference maintains interval maxima and sums during each backward scan. A correct slower implementation recomputes both aggregates from each slice, completes all tiers, and fails by scaling.
